case_title: VIRGINIA SALEPPI VS. RENWOOD ANDRONICO LENDING, 1, LLC DBA ANDRONICO'S COMMUNITY MARKETS

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALEPPI, VIRGINIA AS TO DEFENDANT RENWOOD ANDRONICO LENDING, 1, LLC DBA ANDRONICO'S COMMUNITY MARKETS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SALEPPI, VIRGINIA AS TO DEFENDANT RENWOOD ANDRONICO LENDING, 1, LLC DBA ANDRONICO'S COMMUNITY MARKETS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALEPPI, VIRGINIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RENWOOD ANDRONICO LENDING, 1, LLC DBA ANDRONICO'S COMMUNITY MARKETS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-29-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHIP KEGLEY--DIRECTOR OF HUMAN RESOURCES. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALEPPI, VIRGINIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RENWOOD ANDRONICO LENDING, 1, LLC DBA ANDRONICO'S COMMUNITY MARKETS ALL PARTIES AGREE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO REFLECT THE DEFENDANT'S CORRECT NAME AND WAIVE ANY IRREGULARITIES INCLUDING SERVICE AND NOTICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
